name: Unusual Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening and sugar.
2. Add eggs and mix well.
3. Sift dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, and salt) and add to the creamed mixture.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients: mashed bananas, nuts, chopped maraschino cherries, and chocolate chips.
5. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan.
6. Bake for 45 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
